hero.subtitle: IVN Labs is a team of developers building smart solutions — from AI agents to enterprise platforms. We turn ideas into products.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: About Us
about.desc1: IVN Labs is a team of professionals that turns ideas into innovative technological solutions. We specialize in software development, web applications, mobile apps, and IT consulting.
about.desc2: Our approach is to deeply understand the client's business in order to build solutions that truly work. We don't just write code — we build the technological foundation for your business growth.

aivan.label: Mobile App
aivan.title: Aivan Expert
aivan.desc: AI platform for automating expert assessments and business analysis. Smart assistant for your team.
aivan.heroDesc: Automate analytics, generate professional reports and make data-driven decisions faster than ever.
aivan.f1Desc: Automatically analyzes large volumes of data and identifies key patterns in seconds.
aivan.f2Desc: Generates structured reports in one click — ready for clients and management.
aivan.f3Desc: Full access to all features from iOS and Android devices at any time.
aivan.f4Desc: Connects to your existing systems via REST API with minimal effort.
aivan.f5Desc: Real-time collaboration, comments and change history for your team.
aivan.f6Desc: Data encryption, role-based access and compliance with international security standards.
aivan.h1Desc: Import from Excel, 1C, CRM or connect a data source via API.
aivan.h2Desc: The algorithm processes data and generates expert conclusions in seconds.
aivan.h3Desc: A ready professional report — download as PDF or share via link.
aivan.ctaDesc: Submit a request and get a free personalized demo

rost.label: Analytics
rost.title: Rost
rost.desc: Growth analytics system for small and medium businesses. Track KPIs and manage results.
rost.heroDesc: Track KPIs, forecast sales and manage company growth based on real data.
rost.f1Desc: All key metrics in one dashboard with real-time updates.
rost.f2Desc: AI models predict sales and trends based on historical data.
rost.f3Desc: Automatic data synchronization from 1C without manual input.
rost.f4Desc: Build reports of any complexity with flexible filters and visualizations.
rost.f5Desc: Get instant notifications when KPIs deviate from planned values.
rost.f6Desc: Manage multiple companies in one account without switching.
rost.h1Desc: Integrate 1C, CRM or upload Excel — takes no more than 15 minutes.
rost.h2Desc: Choose the KPIs you need or create your own — no developers required.
rost.h3Desc: Daily dashboards, forecasts and alerts keep you on top of your business.
rost.ctaDesc: 14-day free trial — no credit card required

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: Real results for real companies
projects.ctaDesc: Tell us about your task — we'll build a solution for your business

ecom.title: E-commerce Platform
ecom.desc: Marketplace with AI recommendations, personalization and built-in analytics for a retail company
ecom.challenge: The client was losing up to 70% of users at the product selection stage due to an overloaded interface and lack of personalization.
ecom.solution: We built a marketplace with an AI recommendation engine, smart search and adaptive UI. Integrated behavioral analytics.
ecom.result: Conversion grew by 340% in the first 3 months. Average time on site increased from 1.2 to 4.8 minutes.

bank.title: Banking Corporate Portal
bank.desc: High-load corporate portal with Central Bank API integration processing millions of transactions
bank.challenge: The existing system couldn't handle more than 50K requests per hour and had critical security vulnerabilities.
bank.solution: Built a microservice architecture on Java Spring + Kafka. Implemented multi-level protection and Central Bank API integration.
bank.result: The system processes 2M+ transactions per day with zero downtime. Response time reduced from 2.3s to 180ms.

crm.title: Logistics CRM System
crm.desc: Order, route and customer management system for a large logistics company
crm.challenge: Managers spent 5+ hours daily on manual data entry and coordinating routes between departments.
crm.solution: Created a CRM with automatic order distribution, route optimization and a unified workspace.
crm.result: Manual work reduced by 60%. Order processing speed tripled. ROI over 6 months — 420%.

bi.title: Retail BI Dashboard
bi.desc: Power BI analytics platform with 50+ real-time metrics for a retail chain
bi.challenge: Management made decisions based on monthly Excel reports with a 2-3 week delay.
bi.solution: Built a BI platform on Power BI + Python with automatic dashboards and KPI deviation alerts.
bi.result: 50+ metrics update in real time. Decision-making speed increased 8x. 12% hidden losses identified.

bot.title: HR Telegram Bot
bot.desc: AI bot for automating hiring, onboarding and HR processes with 10K+ employee audience
bot.challenge: An HR team of 5 couldn't handle the application flow: 200+ candidates per month, manual document verification.
bot.solution: Developed a Telegram bot with AI resume screening, automatic onboarding and HR system integration.
bot.result: 10K+ active users. Application processing time from 3 days to 4 hours. HR workload reduced by 70%.

erp.title: ERP Integration 1C + SAP
erp.desc: Seamless integration of 1C, SAP and CRM for a manufacturing enterprise with zero data loss
erp.challenge: Three disconnected systems (1C, SAP, custom CRM) led to data duplication and reporting errors.
erp.solution: Created an integration bus on Python + RabbitMQ with bidirectional synchronization and data integrity monitoring.
erp.result: 0 data loss since launch. 500K+ records synchronized daily. Reporting became unified and accurate.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experience working with IVN Labs
testimonials.ctaDesc: Share your experience — your review helps us grow

r1.name: Aziz N.
r1.text: IVN Labs built our platform from scratch in record time. The team deeply understood our business processes. Conversion tripled in the first 3 months.

r2.name: Bahrom Y.
r2.text: Exceptional technical expertise. They implemented a microservice architecture that our in-house team couldn't solve in a year. The system now handles 10× more load.

r3.name: Sanjar M.
r3.text: We came for a CRM and got much more: integrations, automation, BI dashboard. They proactively suggested solutions we hadn't even considered.

r4.name: Nilufar A.
r4.text: The Telegram bot automated 70% of our candidate workflow. Application processing time dropped from 3 days to 4 hours. Extremely pleased with the outcome.

r5.name: Davron K.
r5.text: We've been working with IVN Labs for 2 years and completed 5 projects together. Always on time, transparent communication, and high-quality code every time.

r6.name: Zafar T.
r6.text: Integrating 1C and SAP was our biggest pain point. IVN Labs solved it in 2 months — 500K+ records sync automatically now. Zero data loss since launch.
